Get Started
AI Workflow Automation

Your team shouldn't be doing
work AI can handle.

We build AI workflow automation using Claude — replacing the repetitive, time-consuming work that fills your team's calendar and drains their energy.

Automate Your Workflows → See All Services
What's eating your time

The work that never ends
doesn't have to be yours.

✍️
Writing the same things over and over
Proposals, follow-ups, reports, email sequences — variations of the same content, every week.
⚙️
Manual processes that could be faster
Steps that happen in sequence, require judgment, and could be templated into a reliable workflow.
🔎
Research that takes hours
Gathering, reading, synthesizing information from multiple sources — before you can even start the actual work.
🧠
Knowledge trapped in heads
Institutional knowledge that's not written down — and can't scale because it lives with one person.
What we build

Automation that actually runs.

Not theoretical frameworks. Working Claude workflows your team uses every day.

01
Workflow Audit
We map your current processes and rank them by automation potential — highest impact first.
02
Claude Configuration
Projects, system prompts, and knowledge bases set up for each workflow category.
03
Workflow Build
We build out the actual workflows — inputs, prompts, outputs, and quality checks — until they're reliable.
04
Documentation
Simple playbooks for each automated workflow so your team can run them without thinking about it.
05
Team Training
Live training until everyone on your team is running the workflows confidently and independently.
06
Iteration
We refine based on how the workflows perform in practice — not just how they perform in demos.
Use Cases

What gets automated.

Sales Outreach Proposal Drafting Customer Follow-Ups Market Research Content Creation SOP Writing Meeting Summaries Competitive Analysis
